mapper.insert: insert into report_record ( report_user_id, report_type, target_id, target_user_id, team_id, reason_text, description_text, status ) values ( #{reportUserId}, #{reportType}, #{targetId}, #{targetUserId}, #{teamId}, #{reasonText}, #{descriptionText}, #{status} )
mapper.select: select * from report_record where id = #{reportId} limit 1

select rr.id as report_id, rr.report_type, rr.status as report_status, rr.reason_text, rr.report_user_id, reporter.user_no as report_user_no, reporter.nickname as report_user_nickname, rr.target_id, rr.target_user_id, target_user.user_no as target_user_no, target_user.nickname as target_user_nickname, rr.team_id, st.team_name, msg.content as target_content, msg.deleted_flag as target_deleted_flag, rr.create_time from report_record rr left join app_user reporter on reporter.id = rr.report_user_id left join app_user target_user on target_user.id = rr.target_user_id left join study_team st on st.id = rr.team_id left join study_team_chat_message msg on rr.report_type = 'team_chat' and msg.id = rr.target_id where (#{status} is null or #{status} = '' or rr.status = #{status}) and (#{reportType} is null or #{reportType} = '' or rr.report_type = #{reportType}) order by case rr.status when 'pending' then 0 else 1 end, rr.create_time desc, rr.id desc limit #{limit}

select rr.id as report_id, rr.report_type, rr.status as report_status, rr.reason_text, rr.description_text, rr.report_user_id, reporter.user_no as report_user_no, reporter.nickname as report_user_nickname, rr.target_id, rr.target_user_id, target_user.user_no as target_user_no, target_user.nickname as target_user_nickname, rr.team_id, st.team_name, msg.content as target_content, msg.masked_flag as target_masked_flag, msg.deleted_flag as target_deleted_flag, msg.deleted_reason as target_deleted_reason, rr.handled_user_id, handled_user.user_no as handled_user_no, handled_user.nickname as handled_user_nickname, rr.handled_time, rr.create_time from report_record rr left join app_user reporter on reporter.id = rr.report_user_id left join app_user target_user on target_user.id = rr.target_user_id left join app_user handled_user on handled_user.id = rr.handled_user_id left join study_team st on st.id = rr.team_id left join study_team_chat_message msg on rr.report_type = 'team_chat' and msg.id = rr.target_id where rr.id = #{reportId} limit 1
select * from report_audit_record where report_id = #{reportId} order by create_time desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into report_audit_record ( report_id, admin_user_id, decision, delete_content_flag, punishment_type, duration_days, reason_text ) values ( #{reportId}, #{adminUserId}, #{decision}, #{deleteContentFlag}, #{punishmentType}, #{durationDays}, #{reasonText} )

insert into punishment_record ( user_id, report_id, punishment_type, status, duration_days, reason_text, operator_user_id, start_time, end_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{reportId}, #{punishmentType}, #{status}, #{durationDays}, #{reasonText}, #{operatorUserId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime} )
mapper.select: select * from punishment_record where user_id = #{userId} and punishment_type = #{punishmentType} and status = 'active' and (end_time is null or end_time > #{now}) order by start_time desc, id desc limit 1

select au.id as user_id, au.user_no, au.nickname, au.avatar_url, au.status, stm.team_id, st.team_name, au.last_login_time, au.create_time from app_user au left join study_team_member stm on stm.user_id = au.id and stm.status = 1 left join study_team st on st.id = stm.team_id and st.status = 1 where (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or au.user_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or au.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or st.invite_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) order by au.last_login_time desc, au.id desc limit #{limit}

select au.id as user_id, au.user_no, au.nickname, au.avatar_url, au.status, ua.auth_account as email, up.bio, up.timezone, ups.allow_friend_view_profile, ups.allow_teammate_view_study, ups.allow_stranger_message, coalesce(study.total_study_seconds, 0) as total_study_seconds, coalesce(cis.total_days, 0) as total_check_in_days, coalesce(cis.consecutive_days, 0) as consecutive_check_in_days, stm.team_id, st.team_name, st.invite_code as team_invite_code, stm.role as team_role, stm.joined_time as team_joined_time, au.last_login_time, au.create_time from app_user au left join user_auth ua on ua.user_id = au.id and ua.auth_type = 'email' left join user_profile up on up.user_id = au.id left join user_privacy_setting ups on ups.user_id = au.id left join ( select user_id, sum(case when status = 'finished' then duration_seconds else 0 end) as total_study_seconds from study_timer_record group by user_id ) study on study.user_id = au.id left join check_in_summary cis on cis.user_id = au.id left join study_team_member stm on stm.user_id = au.id and stm.status = 1 left join study_team st on st.id = stm.team_id and st.status = 1 where au.id = #{userId} limit 1

select rr.id as report_id, rr.report_type, rr.status as report_status, rr.reason_text, rr.description_text, rr.report_user_id, reporter.user_no as report_user_no, reporter.nickname as report_user_nickname, rr.team_id, st.team_name, msg.content as target_content, msg.deleted_flag as target_deleted_flag, rr.create_time from report_record rr left join app_user reporter on reporter.id = rr.report_user_id left join study_team st on st.id = rr.team_id left join study_team_chat_message msg on rr.report_type = 'team_chat' and msg.id = rr.target_id where rr.target_user_id = #{userId} order by rr.create_time desc, rr.id desc limit #{limit}

select pr.id as punishment_id, pr.user_id, pr.report_id, pr.punishment_type, pr.status, pr.duration_days, pr.reason_text, pr.operator_user_id, operator.user_no as operator_user_no, operator.nickname as operator_user_nickname, case when pr.status = 'active' and (pr.end_time is null or pr.end_time > #{now}) then 1 else 0 end as active_flag, pr.start_time, pr.end_time, pr.create_time from punishment_record pr left join app_user operator on operator.id = pr.operator_user_id where pr.user_id = #{userId} and ( #{statusFilter} is null or #{statusFilter} = '' or ( #{statusFilter} = 'active' and pr.status = 'active' and (pr.end_time is null or pr.end_time > #{now}) ) or ( #{statusFilter} = 'history' and not (pr.status = 'active' and (pr.end_time is null or pr.end_time > #{now})) ) ) order by pr.start_time desc, pr.id desc limit #{limit}

select pr.id as punishment_id, pr.user_id, pr.report_id, pr.punishment_type, pr.status, pr.duration_days, pr.reason_text, pr.operator_user_id, operator.user_no as operator_user_no, operator.nickname as operator_user_nickname, case when pr.status = 'active' and (pr.end_time is null or pr.end_time > now()) then 1 else 0 end as active_flag, pr.start_time, pr.end_time, pr.create_time from punishment_record pr left join app_user operator on operator.id = pr.operator_user_id where pr.id = #{punishmentId} limit 1
